name: Forwarder remains in chain_pc_ids after handoff (raw schema check; visibility blocked by Family #1 RLS gap)
method: Insert a share where current_pc_id=PC-B but chain_pc_ids contains PC-A (the forwarder). Schema must preserve PC-A in chain_pc_ids. Note: PC-A's *visibility* of this row at the policy layer is blocked by defect Family #1 (xpc_schedule_shares SELECT policy lacks chain_pc_ids) — that is the same root cause as A2/A3/A5/A6/A8/M3.
cross_reference: See cells/A2.json, cells/M3.json for the visibility-side proof of the same defect family.
